flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Richmond Community College are 11% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($30.0k vs $33.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Richmond Community College fell 24% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.7k → $6.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Richmond Community College fell 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.5k → $2.0k).
